docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WAGNER, ESTELLE TRUSTEE-1984 WAGNER LIVING TRUST AS TO DEFENDANT SARGENT, DONALD SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUN-19-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-22-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAY-30-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-19-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON JUN-19-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUL-19-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JUL-19-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JUL-19-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC TO PLAINTIFF AS TO WHY FAILED TO APPEAR TODAY AND FAILED TO COMPLY WITH COURT RULES; CCP 575.2 HEARING. IF COUNSEL FAILS TO APPEAR AND IF NO GOOD CAUSE FOR THESE FAILURES TO APPEAR, COURT WILL DISMISS CASE HEARING SET FOR AUG-19-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
